core/src/main/java/com/github/skjolber/m.general_idea: Migrate legacy instanceof check with explicit cast to Java 16+ pattern matching for instanceof.
core/src/main/java/com/github/skjolber/m.after:

				responseHeaders.put((String)headers[i], Arrays.asList(string));

core/src/test/resources/spring/beans.xml.general_idea: Migrate Spring XML namespace from Java EE (javax) to Jakarta EE (jakarta) to align with Spring Boot 3.x requirements.
core/src/test/resources/spring/beans.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Jakarta EE namespaces; using the old javax/spring namespace causes runtime failures or validation errors when loading the context.

core/src/test/resources/spring/beans.xml.general_idea: Update schema location to point to the Jakarta EE beans schema instead of the legacy Spring beans schema.
core/src/test/resources/spring/beans.xml.why_exists: The old schema location is invalid for the new Jakarta namespace, causing XML parsing or validation failures.
core/src/test/resources/spring/beans.xml.before:
xsi:schemaLocation="
		http://cxf.apache.org/core http://cxf.apache.org/schemas/core.xsd
		http://www.springframework.org/schema/oxm http://www.springframework.org/schema/oxm/spring-oxm-3.1.xsd
		http://cxf.apache.org/jaxws http://cxf.apache.org/schemas/jaxws.xsd
		http://www.springframework.org/schema/context http://www.springframework.org/schema/context/spring-context-3.1.xsd
		http://www.springframework.org/schema/beans http://www.springframework.org/schema/beans/spring-beans-3.1.xsd
		http://www.springframework.org/schema/mvc http://www.springframework.org/schema/mvc/spring-mvc-3.1.xsd
		http://www.springframework.org/schema/util http://www.springframework.org/schema/util/spring-util-3.1.xsd">

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties from 17 to 21 to align with the new JDK version.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation will fail or produce bytecode incompatible with JDK 21 if source/target levels remain at 17.

pom.xml.general_idea: Switch maven-compiler-plugin configuration from separate source/target to the unified release flag.
pom.xml.why_exists: Using separate source/target is deprecated in newer compiler plugin versions and may cause warnings or errors; release flag is the standard for JDK 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update mockito.version property to a newer snapshot version compatible with JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Mockito versions may fail to instrument classes on JDK 21 due to internal API changes.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update spring.version property to a specific Atlassian-patched version.
pom.xml.why_exists: Ensures compatibility with internal Atlassian patches and JDK 21 requirements.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update byte-buddy.version property to a version supporting JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Byte Buddy requires updates to handle new JDK internal structures and module restrictions in JDK 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update swagger-annotations.version property to a newer snapshot version.
pom.xml.why_exists: Aligns with the groupId change and ensures compatibility with newer OpenAPI/Swagger tooling.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update jacoco-maven-plugin.version property to a newer snapshot version.
pom.xml.why_exists: Newer JaCoCo versions are required to instrument classes compiled for JDK 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update maven-compiler-plugin.version property to a newer snapshot version.
pom.xml.why_exists: Newer compiler plugin versions are required to properly support JDK 21 compilation features.

pom.xml.general_idea: Change swagger-annotations groupId from io.swagger to io.swagger.core.v3.
pom.xml.why_exists: The artifact has moved to a new groupId in newer versions; using the old groupId will result in dependency resolution failure.

test/pom.xml.general_idea: Migrate Swagger annotations dependency from the legacy io.swagger group to the Jakarta-based io.swagger.core.v3 group.
test/pom.xml.why_exists: The io.swagger group is deprecated and incompatible with Spring Boot 3 / Jakarta EE 9+ namespaces; using it causes classpath conflicts or missing class errors at runtime.

test/pom.xml.general_idea: Explicitly set the scope of jakarta.annotation-api to provided to avoid packaging conflicts.
Exclude transitive JUnit 4 dependency from Google Truth to prevent test framework conflicts.

test/src/main/java/com/github/skjolber/m.general_idea: Add @Serial annotation to serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 14+ serialization best practices enforced by modern tooling.
Import java.io.Serial to support the annotation added to the serialVersionUID field.
